changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose SKILL.md (484 lines, 25KB)

Replaced verbose SKILL.md with focused version (~80 lines, 3KB). Removed html2pptx workflow, color palettes, design principles, template workflows, visual details, layout tips, thumbnail grids, and slide-to-image conversion. Added concise python-pptx examples for creation, reading, and structured extraction. Removed unreferenced files: html2pptx.md, ooxml.md, scripts/html2pptx.js, scripts/thumbnail.py, scripts/rearrange.py, scripts/inventory.py, scripts/replace.py. Kept ooxml scripts (pack/unpack/validate) and schemas for editing workflows. Execution time improved significantly (pptx-create: 4m43s → 54s).
